name: Sensational Captivation
outcome: Eye-catching shimmers of light dance across [AttackerName]' dress, drawing [TargetName]'s gaze to her heavy bust as she starts to lazily toy with her top's strap, making her plush bust bounce, jiggle, sway, and {i}strain{/i} against her clothing, the lascivious show teasingly holding [TargetName]'s increasingly enchanted attention.
miss: Eye-catching shimmers of light dance across [AttackerName]' dress, attempting to draw [TargetName]'s gaze to her heavy bust, but [TargetName] manages to ignore the tempting show!
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s mind rapidly fills with infatuated captivation, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] happily staring at the intoxicating buxom display in front of [TargetHimOrHer], unable to look away from the alluring dance of [AttackerName]' jiggly pillows...
